nda-v1.name: Non-Disclosure Agreement
nda-v1.content:
This Non-Disclosure Agreement is made on {{issueDate}} between:

1. {{disclosingParty.name}}, License No. {{disclosingParty.license}}, with an address at: {{disclosingParty.address.building}}, {{disclosingParty.address.street}}, Block {{disclosingParty.address.block}}, {{disclosingParty.address.country}} (the "Disclosing Party").
2. {{receivingParty.name}}, License No. {{receivingParty.license}}, with an address at: {{receivingParty.address.building}}, {{receivingParty.address.street}}, Block {{receivingParty.address.block}}, {{receivingParty.address.country}} (the "Receiving Party").

ARTICLE (1): CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION
"Confidential Information" shall include: {{confidentialInfoDescription}}.

ARTICLE (2): PURPOSE
The Receiving Party agrees to use the Confidential Information solely for the purpose of: {{purpose}}.

ARTICLE (3): OBLIGATIONS
The Receiving Party shall hold and maintain the Confidential Information in strict confidence.

ARTICLE (4): TERM
This Agreement shall remain in effect for a period of {{termYears}} years from the effective date.

ARTICLE (5): GOVERNING LAW
This Agreement shall be governed by {{jurisdiction}}.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement.

Disclosing Party Signature:
Name: {{disclosingParty.name}}
Signature: {{disclosingParty.signature}}
Date: {{disclosingParty.signatureDate}}

Receiving Party Signature:
Name: {{receivingParty.name}}
Signature: {{receivingParty.signature}}
Date: {{receivingParty.signatureDate}}

partnership-agreement-v1.name: Partnership Agreement
partnership-agreement-v1.content:
This Partnership Agreement is entered into on {{issueDate}} to form a partnership known as "{{partnershipName}}".

THE PARTNERS:
1. {{partnerA.name}} (Partner A), with an address at: {{partnerA.address.building}}, {{partnerA.address.street}}, Block {{partnerA.address.block}}, {{partnerA.address.country}}.
2. {{partnerB.name}} (Partner B), with an address at: {{partnerB.address.building}}, {{partnerB.address.street}}, Block {{partnerB.address.block}}, {{partnerB.address.country}}.

ARTICLE (1): PURPOSE OF PARTNERSHIP
The purpose of this partnership is {{partnershipPurpose}}.

ARTICLE (2): CAPITAL CONTRIBUTIONS
- Partner A shall contribute: {{partnerA.contribution}}.
- Partner B shall contribute: {{partnerB.contribution}}.

ARTICLE (3): PROFITS AND LOSSES
- Partner A's share: {{partnerA.profitShare}}%.
- Partner B's share: {{partnerB.profitShare}}%.

ARTICLE (4): DURATION
The duration of this partnership shall be {{duration}}.

ARTICLE (5): GOVERNING LAW
This Agreement shall be governed by {{jurisdiction}}.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement.

Partner A Signature:
Name: {{partnerA.name}}
Signature: {{partnerA.signature}}
Date: {{partnerA.signatureDate}}

Partner B Signature:
Name: {{partnerB.name}}
Signature: {{partnerB.signature}}
Date: {{partnerB.signatureDate}}

service-agreement-v1.name: Service Agreement
service-agreement-v1.content:
This Service Agreement is made and entered into as of {{issueDate}} by and between:

1. {{partyA.name}}, {{#if partyA.partyType=='company'}}holding License No. {{partyA.license}}{{/if}}{{#if partyA.partyType=='individual'}}holding Civil ID No. {{partyA.civilId}}{{/if}}, residing at: {{partyA.address.building}}, {{partyA.address.street}}, Block {{partyA.address.block}}, {{partyA.address.country}}, phone number {{partyA.phone.countryCode}}-{{partyA.phone.number}} (hereinafter referred to as "Party A").
2. {{partyB.name}}, {{#if partyB.partyType=='company'}}holding License No. {{partyB.license}}{{/if}}{{#if partyB.partyType=='individual'}}holding Civil ID No. {{partyB.civilId}}{{/if}}, residing at: {{partyB.address.building}}, {{partyB.address.street}}, Block {{partyB.address.block}}, {{partyB.address.country}}, phone number {{partyB.phone.countryCode}}-{{partyB.phone.number}} (hereinafter referred to as "Party B").

RECITALS:
WHEREAS, Party A desires to retain the services of Party B, and WHEREAS, Party B has the necessary expertise and qualifications to provide such services, the parties agree as follows:

ARTICLE (1): SCOPE OF SERVICES
Party B agrees to provide the following services to Party A: {{serviceDescription}}.

ARTICLE (2): TERM
This Agreement shall commence on {{startDate}} and shall terminate on {{endDate}}.

ARTICLE (3): COMPENSATION
In consideration for the services rendered, Party A shall pay Party B a total fee of {{amount}}, payable as follows: {{paymentSchedule}}.

ARTICLE (4): GOVERNING LAW AND JURISDICTION
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{jurisdiction}}. Any disputes arising hereunder shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of {{court}}.

ARTICLE (5): TERMINATION
Either party may terminate this Agreement upon {{noticeDays}} days' written notice to the other party in the event of a material breach of any of its provisions.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement.

Party A Signature:
Name: {{partyA.name}}
Signature: {{partyA.signature}}
Date: {{partyA.signatureDate}}

Party B Signature:
Name: {{partyB.name}}
Signature: {{partyB.signature}}
Date: {{partyB.signatureDate}}
